text.title: SLO Burn Decision Matrix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: accept only if explicit; otherwise escalate
freeze-ship for user-facing; focus-shift for async/batch
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Burn category detected? → matches branch "burn_category == fast" → conclusion ref=r2-action-per-cell
